name: vibeguard
description: Codex App entrypoint for VibeGuard rules, hooks, setup checks, and workflow guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Install and inspect VibeGuard from Codex
interface.longDescription: VibeGuard helps Codex use the existing anti-hallucination rules, setup checks, native hook installer, and development workflows without silently modifying global configuration during plugin discovery.
defaultPrompt: Run a VibeGuard preflight for this repo
